title: ID Card or Passport
description: Original valid German ID or passport (with current address registration if applicable).

title: eVB Number
description: Electronic insurance confirmation — a 7-character code from your insurer.

title: SEPA Mandate
description: Signed direct debit mandate for the motor vehicle tax.

title: Zulassungsbescheinigung II
description: The vehicle title certificate proving ownership (old 'Fahrzeugbrief').

title: HU / AU report
description: Valid technical inspection (TÜV/Dekra). Required for used vehicles.

title: Old license plates
description: Bring the original plates for deregistration — they'll be invalidated on the spot.

title: Plate reservation code
description: If you've pre-reserved a Wunschkennzeichen online, bring the PIN/confirmation.

title: Power of attorney
description: Signed authorisation so we can act on your behalf at the authority.
